creative_brief: Split-screen visual: left side shows a long, winding highway with a refrigerated truck (overlaid text '2,400km'), right side shows a short country road from green pasture to the Brookvale hub (overlaid text '280km'). Clean, warm tones. FarmThru logo bottom right.
primary_text:
Most grocery runs feel routine. But what if I told you the food in your fridge travelled further than your last holiday?

The big chains move a single cut of beef up to 2,400km through cold storage before it reaches you. Rachel Ward's regenerative cattle travel just 280km from her farm to our Brookvale hub.

Same quality. Fraction of the distance. No middlemen, no wholesalers inflating the price.

We're building something different and the waitlist is how you get first access. Early spots are limited. Once our hub capacity fills, new orders queue behind existing collectors.

No lock-in. No commitment. Order when you want, collect from Brookvale Monday to Friday.
headline: Only 280km from farm to your next meal
description: Waitlist members get first access to FarmThru's Brookvale hub. Spots are limited.
